description: Remove saturated events from an FCS data file
author: Josef Spidlen, BC Cancer Agency
plan:
## RemoveSaturatedFCSEvents GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
RemoveSaturatedFCSEvents is a GenePattern module that Remove saturated events from an FCS data file

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 2 parameters:
- Required: Input.FCS.data.file
- Optional: Output.FCS.file.name

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -jar <libdir>removesaturated.jar <Input.FCS.data.file> <Output.FCS.file.name>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Input.FCS.data.file
parameters.description: An FCS data file to remove saturated events from.
